turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. Actually I want to cancel my appointment for now and maybe book in about a month. My insurance approval is still pending.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood, no problem at all. Name and appointment details?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Narayan Joshi. I had next Tuesday 10 AM with Dr. Vinay Kapoor.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Narayan Joshi, Tuesday 10 AM with Dr. Kapoor — cancelling this. Once your insurance approval comes through, just call us back and we'll rebook.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Will there be any priority given since I cancelled due to insurance?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We'll note the reason for cancellation. While we can't guarantee priority, we'll try our best to accommodate your preferred slot when you call back.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good luck with the insurance process. Hope it clears soon!
